name: Storm Spirit
description: Everyone complains about the weather…well, I'm doing something about it! Raijin Thunderkeg, the Storm Spirit.

abilities.name: Galvanized
abilities.description: Innately grants Storm Spirit permanent mana regeneration bonus over time in certain conditions.

abilities.name: Static Remnant
abilities.description: After an activation delay, the remnant detonates and deals damage if an enemy unit comes near it. When activated, the ability creates an explosively charged remnant of Raijin that gives vision for a period of time at his current location. The remnant does not move.

abilities.name: Electric Vortex
abilities.description: Pulls an enemy unit to Raijin's location. applies an additional debuff that procs Overload of its corresponding level on the debuff-affected enemy unit, upon its attack point.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.description: Raijin overloads and creates an electrical charge upon an ability cast. The next attack deals damage and applies a slow within attacked enemy unit's radius.

abilities.name: Ball Lightning
abilities.description: Charging across the battlefield until he depletes his mana or reaches his target. The damage increases linearly as Raijin travels, starting from the cast location.
